---
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
page-layout: full
include-in-header: 
  - _includes/fontawesome-2up.html
title: "We are the team delivering Data Science for Health and Social Care courses within Edinburgh Medical School (University of Edinburgh). Here you will find information about our courses, about us and resources we're creating."
listing:
  contents:
    - "about.qmd"
    - "people.qmd"
    - "resources.qmd"
    - "teaching.qmd"
    - "contact.qmd"
  sort: false
  type: grid
---
